first_workflow_guidance.rationale: Install the baseline pack first, then enter the runtime through /skills.
commands: node packages/cli/src/bin/pairslash.js preview install pairslash-memory-write-global --runtime codex --target repo
node packages/cli/src/bin/pairslash.js install pairslash-memory-write-global --runtime codex --target repo --apply --yes
Launch codex from the repo root and use /skills to run pairslash-memory-write-global.
